khula_or_dissolution.title: Filing for Khula or Dissolution of Marriage

steps.details: State marriage details, reasons for dissolution, children if any, dower, maintenance, and requested relief.

steps.action: File the plaint in Family Court
steps.details: Submit the suit with CNIC, Nikah Nama, address details, and supporting documents.
The court may attempt reconciliation before deciding dissolution and related relief.
steps.timeline: 1-6 months depending on service and hearings

office.name: Family Court
office.note: File in the family court having jurisdiction over the parties or cause of action

khula_or_dissolution.estimated_cost: PKR 1000-5000 for basic filing, copying, and process fee
khula_or_dissolution.estimated_timeline: 1-6 months depending on service and hearings
khula_or_dissolution.relevant_law: Family Courts Act, 1964; Dissolution of Muslim Marriages Act, 1939

maintenance_claim.title: Claiming Maintenance for Wife or Children

steps.details: List monthly expenses, income information, school fees, medical expenses, and prior support history.

steps.action: File the claim in Family Court
steps.details: Attach identity documents, Nikah Nama, birth certificates, and expense proofs.
Ask the court for temporary support while the main case proceeds.

required_documents.source: School, hospital, rent, utility, or grocery records

office.name: Family Court
office.note: Use the court registry for filing and diary number

maintenance_claim.estimated_cost: PKR 1000-5000 for filing and process fee
maintenance_claim.estimated_timeline: 1-6 months; interim relief may be earlier
maintenance_claim.relevant_law: Family Courts Act, 1964; Muslim Family Laws Ordinance, 1961

child_custody_guardianship.title: Applying for Child Custody or Guardianship

steps.action: Prepare a guardianship or custody petition
steps.details: Explain the child's welfare, current living arrangement, schooling, expenses, and requested custody or visitation terms.

steps.action: File in the Guardian or Family Court
steps.details: Attach child identity documents, school records, parent CNICs, and any prior orders.

steps.action: Attend hearings and produce child welfare evidence
steps.details: The court focuses on the welfare of the minor, not only the preference of either parent.

required_documents.name_ur: بچے کا بی فارم یا پیدائشی سرٹیفکیٹ

office.name: Guardian Court or Family Court
office.note: File where the minor ordinarily resides or where jurisdiction applies

child_custody_guardianship.estimated_cost: PKR 1000-5000 for basic filing and process fee
child_custody_guardianship.estimated_timeline: 2-12 months depending on contest and evidence
child_custody_guardianship.relevant_law: Guardians and Wards Act, 1890; Family Courts Act, 1964
